ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the applicant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the applicant (e.g., male, female) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the applicant */,
  "career_stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the career stage of the applicant */,
  "subfield_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subfield of research of the applicant */,
  "first_time" TEXT /* Indicates whether the applicant is a first-time or returning applicant */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution where the applicant is affiliated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or institute within the institution */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant for communication */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the applicant */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Additional research interests of the applicant */,
  "previous_funding" TEXT /* Information on any previous funding received by the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicants_career_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("career_stage_id") REFERENCES career_stages ("career_stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicants_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicants_subfield_id FOREIGN KEY ("subfield_id") REFERENCES subfields ("subfield_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to (e.g., OECD) */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code for the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country for economic context */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "career_stages" (
  "career_stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each career stage */,
  "career_stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the career stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the career stage */,
  "min_years_experience" INTEGER /* Minimum years of experience required for the career stage */,
  "max_years_experience" INTEGER /* Maximum years of experience for the career stage */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Typical salary range for the career stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("career_stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subfields" (
  "subfield_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subfield */,
  "subfield_name" TEXT /* Name of the subfield (e.g., cosmology, exoplanets) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subfield */,
  "related_subfields" TEXT /* Related subfields of research that are often studied in conjunction */,
  "funding_trends" TEXT /* Trends in funding for the subfield */,
  "research_communities" TEXT /* Major research communities or groups in the subfield */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subfield_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant who submitted the application */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., submitted, reviewed, funded) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding requested */,
  "project_title" TEXT /* Title of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer assigned to the application */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Proposed start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* Proposed end date of the project */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* Names and affiliations of any collaborators */,
  "research_impact" TEXT /* Expected impact of the research project */,
  "funding_history" TEXT /* History of funding for similar projects in the same subfield */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., cosmology, exoplanets) */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution where the reviewer is affiliated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or institute within the institution */,
  "reviewer_status" TEXT /* Status of the reviewer (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "reviewer_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer providing the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments and feedback provided by the reviewer */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given to the application (1-10) */,
  "review_method" TEXT /* Method used for the review (e.g., peer review, panel review) */,
  "review_duration" INTEGER /* Duration in days taken to complete the review */,
  "confidence_score" INTEGER /* Confidence score of the reviewer in their assessment (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funded_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funded project */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application that led to the funded project */,
  "funding_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the funding period */,
  "funding_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the funding period */,
  "total_funding" REAL /* Total amount of funding provided */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "final_report" TEXT /* Path to the final report of the project */,
  "project_milestones" TEXT /* Key milestones of the project */,
  "project_publications" TEXT /* List of publications resulting from the project */,
  "project_presentations" TEXT /* List of presentations given as part of the project */,
  "project_impact_report" TEXT /* Path to the impact report of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funded_projects_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that led to the publication */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* List of authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  "citation_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the publication in the field */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES funded_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "presentations" (
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each presentation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that led to the presentation */,
  "presentation_title" TEXT /* Title of the presentation */,
  "presentation_date" TEXT /* Date of the presentation */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Name of the conference where the presentation was given */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the conference */,
  "presentation_type" TEXT /* Type of presentation (e.g., oral, poster) */,
  "presentation_abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the presentation */,
  "presentation_audience" TEXT /* Target audience of the presentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("presentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_presentations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES funded_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., reviewer, administrator) */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution where the user is affiliated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or institute within the institution */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
